install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y build-essential patchelf curl git libgl1-mesa-dev libgl1-mesa-glx libglew-dev libosmesa6-dev software-properties-common wget && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* || bash /workspace/install_mesa.sh

pip install einops hydra-core omegaconf wandb dill zarr==2.16.1 numcodecs==0.12.1 av h5py tqdm matplotlib six cython==3.0.0 numba==0.59.1 shapely==1.8.5.post1 scikit-image==0.22.0 opencv-python-headless imagecodecs pygame pymunk gym==0.23.1
pip uninstall -y opencv-python && pip install --force-reinstall --no-deps opencv-python-headless
pip install click dm_control cloudpickle termcolor

LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/mujoco/mujoco210/bin:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH} MUJOCO_PY_MUJOCO_PATH=/opt/mujoco/mujoco210 python3 -c "import gym, d4rl; envs = ['hopper-medium-v2', 'walker2d-medium-v2', 'halfcheetah-medium-v2']; [d4rl.qlearning_dataset(gym.make(e)) or print('Downloaded:', e) for e in envs]"
